hero.title: Your wedding, exactly as you imagine it.
hero.subtitle: Belgium's first premium platform dedicated to Afro and mixed weddings. We understand your traditions, your families, and your vision.

value_props.title: Why choose Mariage Afro?
value_props.item1_desc: A deep understanding of your traditions and customs for an authentic celebration.
value_props.item2_desc: Exclusive access to the best specialized vendors in Belgium.
value_props.item3_desc: Personalized guidance to bring your unique vision to life.
value_props.item4_desc: Enjoy your day, we manage every detail with excellence.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From full planning to day-of coordination, we offer solutions adapted to your needs.
services.item1_desc: We handle the entire organization of your wedding, from venue search to day-of coordination.
services.item2_desc: You've already started planning but need help finalizing preparations and coordinating vendors.
services.item3_desc: Fully enjoy your day, we orchestrate the flow and manage any unforeseen events.

film_de_miel.label: Immortalize the moment
film_de_miel.title: Honeymoon Film
film_de_miel.desc: Relive the emotion of your wedding through an exceptional cinematic film. Our videographers capture every glance, every smile, for a lasting memory.

prestations.title: Our Vendors
prestations.subtitle: A network of handpicked professionals to elevate your event.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We are here to listen and advise you.
